title: Co-Occurring Disorders Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Co-Occurring Disorders Support Groups 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS OF OREGON DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS PEER SUPPORT GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support groups based on a 12 step model. 4141 SE Division Street Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Individuals with co-occurring mental health challenges and substance use disorders and their families Hours: Varies by meeting Email (503) 222-6484 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIFEWAYS INC PEER SUPPORT CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Partners with Lifeways to provide a range of services and support to mental health consumers, including self-help groups, skill groups, advocacy, activities, peer-to-peer support, food bank, linkage to community resources, dual diagnosis group, and National Alliance for Mental Illness (NAMI) services. 702 Sunset Drive Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing mental health issues Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 889-9167 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS OF OREGON DUAL DIAGNOSIS ANONYMOUS PEER SUPPORT GROUP LIFEWAYS INC PEER SUPPORT CENTER
